message:
Add record format serialization to fsqlite-types

Implements SQLite record format encoding and decoding as described in the
file format specification (https://www.sqlite.org/fileformat.html#record_format).

A SQLite record consists of a header (header-size varint + per-column serial
type varints) followed by packed column data. This module provides the
building blocks for reading and writing these records, which is essential
for the B-tree layer's cell parsing and the VDBE's MakeRecord/Column opcodes.

crates/fsqlite-types/src/record.rs (439 LOC):
- Record header parsing and construction
- Varint encoding/decoding for header fields
- Integration with the existing serial_type module for type classification
  and byte-length computation

Also adds `pub mod record` to lib.rs to expose the new module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
